scripts.build:demo: test -f packages/v-scroll/dist/index.js && bun run --cwd apps/demo build
scripts.build: bun run build:lib && bun run build:demo
scripts.check: bun run --cwd packages/v-scroll check && bun run --cwd apps/demo check
scripts.test: bun run test:workspace-config && bun run --cwd packages/v-scroll test && bun run --cwd apps/demo test
